temporal_policy.snapshot_rule: Features must use information known on or before December 31 of snapshot_year unless explicitly marked current_context.
temporal_policy.label_rule: Phase 10A labels represent future new-construction targets and must not be used as features.
temporal_policy.current_context_caveat: Current zoning, flood overlays, school assignment, and parcel valuation are included for baseline readiness review, but are not historical snapshots.

features.description: Calculated parcel acreage from current parcel geometry.
features.notes: Use as a baseline parcel characteristic. Historical parcel split/merge chronology is not yet modeled.

features.description: Current land value field.
features.notes: Not time-safe until historical assessment snapshots are available.

features.description: Current building/improvement value field.
features.notes: May reflect improvements created after older snapshot years.

features.description: Current assessed or market value proxy.
features.notes: Use only for current-context baseline until historical values exist.

features.description: Current value per acre.
features.notes: Derived from current valuation and acreage.

features.description: Current heuristic flag for parcels with land value but little or no improvement value.
features.notes: Useful for due-diligence review but not time-safe for backtesting.

features.description: Current dominant parcel zoning code.
features.notes: No historical zoning change series exists yet.

features.description: Current zoning jurisdiction.
features.notes: Current jurisdiction context, not a historical snapshot.

features.description: Confidence/quality of current zoning overlay assignment.
features.notes: Quality signal for feature reliability.

features.description: Current dominant zoning code from the parcel zoning overlay and registered current zoning sources.
features.notes: Useful for present-day due diligence and current-context exploration only. Do not use as historical zoning for past snapshot years.

features.description: Current zoning jurisdiction associated with the dominant zoning assignment.
features.notes: Current jurisdiction context only; not a historical jurisdiction series.

features.description: Current broad/general zoning category derived from jurisdictional zoning source fields.
features.notes: Broad current zoning category is descriptive only until historical zoning snapshots or dated case records exist.

features.description: Whether the current zoning source has a case-number-like field that could support future joins to rezoning records.
features.notes: A case number is only a possible link key. It is not a zoning-change event without approval/effective date, old zoning, and new zoning.

features.description: Whether a historical zoning snapshot exists for the parcel-year without using current zoning fallback.
features.notes: Available for future model comparison; excluded from strict baseline until Phase 10E evaluates the historical zoning layer quality.

features.description: Age of the historical zoning source used for a snapshot year.
features.notes: Post-2015 snapshots use the latest prior historical source and must carry staleness through this feature.

features.description: Whether a historical zoning map-change event was detected in the prior one-year window.
features.notes: Detected map change, not official rezoning case history unless linked dated case records are added.

features.description: Whether a historical zoning map-change event was detected in the prior three-year window.
features.notes: Candidate Phase 10E feature; not included in the current strict baseline.

features.description: Whether a historical zoning map-change event was detected in the prior five-year window.
features.notes: Candidate Phase 10E feature; not included in the current strict baseline.

features.description: Count of historical zoning map-change events detected in the prior five years.
features.notes: Map-change count should be reviewed against official case data before production modeling.

features.description: Years since the latest detected historical zoning map-change event as of the snapshot year.
features.notes: Use only with change_year <= snapshot_year and explicit stale-source caveats.

features.description: Most recent detected zoning map-change type before or at the snapshot year.
features.notes: Categorical map-change signal requiring Phase 10E model comparison and QA.

features.description: Whether detected zoning map changes suggest an intensity increase in the prior five years.
features.notes: Intensity mapping is conservative and should be reviewed by planning staff before production use.

features.description: Whether prior five-year map changes moved toward mixed-use, commercial, industrial, or similar growth-supportive categories.
features.notes: Descriptive map-change signal, not official rezoning approval history.

features.description: Confidence label for detected historical zoning map-change events.
features.notes: Confidence reflects source-year gap and overlay quality, not official case certainty.

features.description: Whether the zoning snapshot is exact-year, prior-available-year, or unavailable.
features.notes: Carries source staleness into future zoning-enhanced model comparison.

features.description: Current FEMA NFHL-derived parcel flood constraint score.
features.notes: Flood zones are regulatory constraints, but historical effective map changes are not tracked yet.

features.description: Whether FEMA flood overlay indicates review is recommended.
features.notes: Regulatory-context constraint, not a modeled flood prediction.

features.description: Attendance-zone assignment confidence from polygon overlap.
features.notes: Attendance-zone boundaries are current; historical boundary changes are not modeled.

features.description: Official school capacity status placeholder.
features.notes: Always not_available until official enrollment/capacity data is ingested.

features.description: Count of matched permits on or before snapshot year-end and within one prior year.
features.notes: Filtered by activity_date <= snapshot_year end.

features.description: Prior three-year count of event-level permits classified as residential growth.
features.notes: Uses event-level segment flags joined to permit-parcel relationships.

features.description: Prior three-year count of event-level permits classified as commercial activity.
features.notes: Uses event-level segment flags joined to permit-parcel relationships.

features.description: Prior three-year count of staff-provided new-construction permit events.
features.notes: Filtered by permit_file_date <= snapshot_year end.

features.description: Prior three-year count of completed new-construction events.
features.notes: This is prior completion status only and is not a future label.

features.description: Existing current-context parcel development activity score.
features.notes: All-time/current dashboard metric; included only for readiness review.

features.description: Future neighborhood/nearby permit activity feature.
features.notes: Requires spatial neighborhood aggregation design; remains null in Phase 10B.

features.description: Future historical zoning change signals.
features.notes: Do not fake zoning changes. Add only after vetted historical zoning data exists.

features.description: Current-context distance in feet from parcel centroid to nearest road centerline.
features.notes: Derived from current Cabarrus County Centerlines. Requires historical roads or dated project data before strict temporal modeling.

features.description: Current-context distance in feet to nearest source-classified major road when classification is credible.
features.notes: Null in Phase 12B because source major-road classification is too sparse for countywide use. Needs NCDOT or internal road hierarchy data.

features.description: Current-context road length density within 1,000 feet of parcel centroid.
features.notes: Centroid-buffer proximity feature; not historical unless roads are dated.

features.description: Current-context road length density within a half mile of parcel centroid.
features.notes: Centroid-buffer proximity feature; not historical unless roads are dated.

features.description: Future network-derived intersection count within 1,000 feet.
features.notes: Left null in Phase 12B because reliable intersection extraction requires network topology QA.

features.description: Current-context distance in feet from parcel centroid to nearest rail centerline.
features.notes: Current rail geometry only; use as current-context until dated historical rail/project records are available.

features.description: Whether the parcel centroid is within a half mile of the registered rail corridor geometry.
features.notes: Current-context corridor proximity only; not a prediction or suitability score.

features.description: Current/planned-context distance in feet from parcel centroid to nearest Cabarrus-related NCDOT STIP project geometry.
features.notes: Derived from NCDOT 2026-2035 STIP records filtered to Cabarrus-related projects. Do not use in strict historical training without temporal availability review.

features.description: Whether a parcel centroid is within a half mile of a Cabarrus-related STIP project.
features.notes: Planned transportation investment context only; not a future development prediction.

features.description: Whether a parcel centroid is within one mile of a Cabarrus-related STIP project.
features.notes: STIP is not a complete local planned-road inventory and should be supplemented by county/municipal project data.

features.description: Count of Cabarrus-related STIP project geometries within one mile of parcel centroid.
features.notes: Counts source geometries, not unique funded project phases unless STIP records are further normalized.

features.description: Current/planned-context flag for parcels within one mile of a Cabarrus-related STIP project.
features.notes: Do not treat as a historical feature unless project adoption/availability dates are aligned to snapshot years.

features.description: Current-context distance in feet from parcel centroid to nearest NCDOT AADT station.
features.notes: Station proximity is a traffic-demand proxy, not parcel-specific trip generation.

features.description: Latest source-reported AADT value at the nearest NCDOT traffic count station.
features.notes: Preserves latest available AADT_YYYY value from the source; use count year caveats before historical modeling.

features.description: Maximum source-reported AADT value among stations within one mile of parcel centroid.
features.notes: Current traffic demand context only.

features.description: Average source-reported AADT value among stations within one mile of parcel centroid.
features.notes: Null when no station falls within one mile.

features.description: Quality label for parcel AADT context feature completeness.
features.notes: Metadata guardrail for missing station or count context.

features.description: Whether a parcel intersects the Concord Central Area Plan boundary.
features.notes: Concord/Central Area only. Do not treat as countywide future land use or historical planning intent.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Current Concord Central Area future land-use category where available.
features.notes: Not countywide and not time-safe unless plan adoption/effective dates are aligned to snapshot years.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Whether a parcel intersects a Concord Central Area primary activity area.
features.notes: Planning context only, not a development approval.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Whether a parcel intersects or touches a Concord Central Area special corridor.
features.notes: Concord-specific planning context.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Count of currently linked Accela plan review records for a parcel.
features.notes: Early pipeline signal only. Do not treat as approval, permit issuance, or completed development.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved but top-k lift declined sharply; needs temporal filtering, status semantics, and jurisdiction QA.

features.description: Whether current plan review records suggest an early development pipeline signal.
features.notes: Current Accela context only; not a historical feature without dated availability rules.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved but top-k lift declined sharply; needs temporal filtering, status semantics, and jurisdiction QA.

features.description: Distance from parcel centroid to nearest RevalMap WSACC manhole proxy.
features.notes: Utility proximity proxy only; not sewer capacity or allocation.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: proxy-only utility fields did not improve top-k lift; needs true capacity/allocation data.

features.description: Distance from parcel centroid to nearest RevalMap WSACC sewer-line proxy.
features.notes: Utility proximity proxy only; not sewer capacity or allocation.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: proxy-only utility fields did not improve top-k lift; needs true capacity/allocation data.

features.description: Whether a parcel intersects a RevalMap WSACC district proxy polygon.
features.notes: Service context proxy only; does not indicate capacity availability.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: proxy-only utility fields did not improve top-k lift; needs true capacity/allocation data.

features.description: Guardrail flag confirming true utility capacity is unavailable in Phase 16A.
features.notes: Must remain false until verified capacity/allocation data is ingested.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: proxy-only utility fields did not improve top-k lift; needs true capacity/allocation data.

features.description: Whether a parcel has a separate Tax Parcels Full enrichment match.
features.notes: Separate enrichment/gap-check only. Does not overwrite public.parcels_enriched.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: tax/value-only ablation improved PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, but remains current-context and needs historical assessment snapshots before production use.

features.description: Current total/assessed value candidate from Tax Parcels Full where matched.
features.notes: Not time-safe without historical assessment snapshots.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: tax/value-only ablation improved PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, but remains current-context and needs historical assessment snapshots before production use.

features.description: Combined data-quality and caveat summary for Phase 16A feature families.
features.notes: Used to prevent overclaiming from current-context planning, pipeline, utility proxy, and tax enrichment features.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: metadata flags are governance guardrails, not predictive inputs.

features.description: Concord Central Area Plan future land-use category copied into the Phase 16B experiment matrix.
features.notes: Phase 16B exploratory model-comparison field only; do not use for strict historical production claims.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Planning-alignment class derived from Concord Central Area Plan future land-use context.
features.notes: Phase 16B exploratory model-comparison field only; do not use for strict historical production claims.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Linked current Accela plan-review count for a parcel.
features.notes: Plan reviews are early pipeline signals, not approvals or completed development.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved but top-k lift declined sharply; needs temporal filtering, status semantics, and jurisdiction QA.

features.description: Recent linked Accela plan-review count from the Phase 16A current-context feature table.
features.notes: Current-context early pipeline signal only; not a production historical feature.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved but top-k lift declined sharply; needs temporal filtering, status semantics, and jurisdiction QA.

features.description: Maximum days open among linked Accela plan-review records.
features.notes: Accela open-duration context requires source-date governance before strict training.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved but top-k lift declined sharply; needs temporal filtering, status semantics, and jurisdiction QA.

features.description: Distance-banded utility proximity proxy based on WSACC sewer-line distance.
features.notes: Proxy only; does not imply capacity, allocation, or service commitment.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: proxy-only utility fields did not improve top-k lift; needs true capacity/allocation data.

features.description: Tax Parcels Full improvement/building value enrichment copied into the Phase 16B experiment matrix.
features.notes: Current valuation enrichment only; does not overwrite the base parcel table.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: tax/value-only ablation improved PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, but remains current-context and needs historical assessment snapshots before production use.

features.description: Current land-value to improvement-value ratio from Tax Parcels Full enrichment where improvement value is available.
features.notes: Derived current enrichment proxy for underbuilt context; not historical valuation evidence.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: tax/value-only ablation improved PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, but remains current-context and needs historical assessment snapshots before production use.

features.description: Tax Parcels Full land value retained alongside the base feature-matrix land_value.
features.notes: Current Tax Parcels Full enrichment only.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: tax/value-only ablation improved PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, but remains current-context and needs historical assessment snapshots before production use.

features.description: Tax Parcels Full total value retained alongside the base feature-matrix total_value.
features.notes: Current Tax Parcels Full enrichment only.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: tax/value-only ablation improved PR-AUC and lift@top 5%, but remains current-context and needs historical assessment snapshots before production use.

features.description: Guardrail flag marking all Phase 16B planning/pipeline/utility fields as current-context only.
features.notes: Must remain true until historical/datable source availability rules exist.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: metadata flags are governance guardrails, not predictive inputs.

features.description: Guardrail flag indicating the feature set includes Concord-only Central Area Plan variables.
features.notes: Prevents treating Central Area Plan coverage as countywide future land use.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: PR-AUC improved slightly but lift@top 5% declined; needs countywide historical/adoption-dated future land-use coverage.

features.description: Guardrail flag indicating utility fields are proximity/service-context proxies only.
features.notes: Prevents interpreting WSACC proxy geometry as true utility capacity.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: proxy-only utility fields did not improve top-k lift; needs true capacity/allocation data.

features.description: Guardrail flag marking Phase 16B fields as not time-safe for strict training.
features.notes: Must remain false for current-context experiment fields.
features.phase16c_governance_notes: Phase 16C: metadata flags are governance guardrails, not predictive inputs.
